series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the awarding of grant monies to the localities for the preservation and management of their permanent public records as authorized by the General Assembly in 1990, (Code of Virginia, Section 17.1-275 (A.2.). The series contains the grant application, certification sheet, and supporting documentation for the project. Project status reports are also maintained in this series.

retention_rules.disposition: Retain in agency for 10 years after the completion of the project, then transfer to the Archives, Library of Virginia for permanent retention.

series_metadata.series_description: This series documents the applications for grant awards under the Virginia Circuit Court Records Preservation Program (CCRPP) that were rejected by the grant review board.
